description: TwinRunner — a simulated-backend Rust/ratatui+crossterm TUI recreation of the J-Runner-with-Extras Xbox 360 NAND/RGH-JTAG modding & repair workflow. Four MVP capability areas (NAND dump read + console-info extraction with binary format parsing; CPU-key library; simulated build/patch image incl. ECC/XeLL/timing; simulated flashing + guided RGH/JTAG troubleshooting). Trait-abstracted build/flash backends with deterministic simulator; real backends are no-op stubs; source dumps are never modified in place (operate on copies). New crate dependencies (ratatui, crossterm, serde, etc.). Public surface: CLI subcommands + library trait APIs + persisted key-library/config schemas.
